title: El Condicional Simple
summary: Conditional formation built on the identical 12 irregular stems from Chapter 33 with a new -ía ending set, the core everyday uses (hypotheticals, polite requests, reported future), the direct past-tense parallel to Chapter 33's present-conjecture use (serían las tres), and the common English 'would'-habitual-past trap that leads learners to misuse the conditional for repeated past actions.
